title: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report January 09 2026
section_path: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report January 09 2026
section_path_text: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report January 09 2026
summary:
Main
in Chinese iron ore and steelmaking prices 09/01/2026
Dalian iron ore futures exhibited a weak, volatile trend today. The benchmark contract I2605 ultimatelyclosed at 814.5 RMB/tons, a decline of 0.73% compared to the previous trading day. In the physical market, prices remained largely unchanged.
